visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women sit at a counter in a brightly lit indoor room. One wears a black shirt, the other a patterned bucket hat. They hold a large red bag of Kirkland Wild Argentine Red Shrimp. (2) A fast-paced montage shows multiple Kirkland shrimp bags with different colored labels (red, blue, purple) overlaid with large yellow and black dynamic text. (3) Close-up shot of small pink shrimp and white garlic cloves being sautéed in a dark frying pan over a gas flame. A following shot shows the cooked shrimp seasoned with herbs in a teal fish-shaped bowl. (4) The scene returns to the two women. The woman on the left holds the red bag and gestures frequently while explaining something. The woman on the right holds a blue bag of Farm Raised Shrimp, listening intently and occasionally pointing at the products.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 野生阿根廷特大紅蝦仁. (2) [Subtitle]: 這是好市多新出的新品. (3) [Subtitle]: 牠原產地也是阿根廷的. (4) [Subtitle]: 跟我們平常買的貴了300塊. (5) [Variety]: 超夯蝦仁買哪個？ (6) [Subtitle]: 差別在他們都有去頭去殼. (7) [Subtitle]: 然後這個(舊)保留了尾巴. (8) [Subtitle]: 但這個(新)尾巴也去掉了. (9) [Subtitle]: 做出來的料理呢. (10) [Subtitle]: 我覺得他的肉質就真的是非常細嫩. (11) [Subtitle]: 就是大家如果在火鍋店吃過一般的那種野生草蝦. (12) [Subtitle]: 跟阿根廷紅蝦就會發現. (13) [Subtitle]: 阿根廷紅蝦的那肉質都比較像我自己覺得有點像小龍蝦. (14) [Subtitle]: 就是他那個肉質很Q軟細嫩. (15) [Subtitle]: 但是呢我覺得缺點就是他相對的他的蝦味比較不夠. [Variety]: 蝦味比較不夠. (16) [Subtitle]: 尤其是他又去頭去殼然後連尾巴都去掉了. (17) [Subtitle]: 所以他料理完之後呢我覺得就只能吃到那個蝦子的肉質非常的細緻Q彈. (18) [Subtitle]: 可是蝦味呢就是沒那麼濃厚. [Variety]: 沒那麼濃厚. (19) [Subtitle]: 沒有我自己覺得有一點點可惜. (20) [Subtitle]: 所以以價格跟性價比來說我沒有很推. (21) [Subtitle]: 除非你特別愛他的口感. (22) [Subtitle]: 就是我覺得這一款追求的只有他的那個肉質非常的Q彈細嫩. (23) [Subtitle]: 不然的話我還是會推薦選一般的野生大草蝦. (24) [Subtitle]: 然後這個size是21-25隻. (25) [Subtitle]: 每磅21-25的我覺得是最棒的. [Slogan]: 一磅約450克. (26) [Variety]: CP值最高. (27) [Subtitle]: 吃起來又很爽.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long dark hair and wears a black t-shirt; the other has shorter hair and wears a zebra-patterned bucket hat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, modern indoor living room or kitchen area with neutral-colored walls and soft furniture.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A main female voice begins a friendly narration about a new Costco product. A light, upbeat acoustic-pop track plays in the background with a steady rhythm. Faint crinkling sounds of plastic bags are heard as they handle the packaging. (2) The narration pauses momentarily, replaced by the crisp, high-frequency sizzling sound of shrimp hitting a hot pan. The music continues at a consistent volume. (3) The main female voice returns with a high-arousal tone, discussing the texture of the shrimp. Occasional soft laughter and affirmative interjections from a second female voice are heard. The background music maintains its tempo until a quick fade-out at the very end.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To review and compare the new Kirkland Wild Argentine Red Shrimp with standard farm-raised shrimp at Costco, highlighting differences in price, texture, and flavor to provide shopping advice.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed display and comparison of Kirkland Signature brand products from Costco.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A typical social media food review with high-quality audio and subtitles, effectively comparing price-to-performance ratios for a niche grocery item.
